description:
Build dataset for training DeepDETAILS models and evaluating its performance.
Inputs: fragments files
Parameters:
* SampleLabels: Name of each cell type
* RawPls: Forward strand signal for each cell type
* RawMns: Reverse strand signal for each cell type
* TotalCounts: Total read counts in the bulk sample (default: 31000000)
* TotalCells: Total cells in the reference sample
* ContRatio: Contribution ratio of different cell types to the bulk (default: 1 / equal contribution)
* MeanFragsCell: Fragment sampling mean per cell (default: 10000)
* StdFragsCell: Fragment sampling std per cell (default: 833)
* CellBarcodes: Cell barcode files for each snATAC-seq sample
* FragProcessing: snATAC-seq fragments processing pipeline (default: naive)
* RandomSeed: Seed for random sampling processes (default:1234567)
* BgSampRatio: Background sampling ratio (default: 1.0)
* WindowSize: Input window size (default: 4096)
* BgBlock: Blocked regions
* GenomeFa: Genome sequence file
* ChromSize: Chromosome size file
* RawFormat: Format of the bulk library signal (default: end_bw)
* WigTool: Path to wiggletools
* W2B: Path to wigToBigWig
* FlexPars: Other parameters to build_dataset.py
name: Simulate Dataset for Signal Deconvolution and Evaluation with preflight (light)

reference.CellRangerATAC2020ChromSize: Tab-separated file stores each chromosome's size (hg38)
reference.HG38_PRIMARY_FA: Primary assemblies of human reference genome GRCh38+chrM+EBV.

step.parameter: zcat merged_fragments.tsv.gz | sed '/^#/d' | awk -v OFS='\t' '{mid=int(($2+$3)/2); print $1,$2,mid,"N",1000,"+"; print $1,mid+1,$3,"N",1000,"-"}' | sort -k 1,1V -k 2,2n -k3,3n --parallel 5 | bgzip -c > tagAlign.gz
callpeak -f BED -g hs -q 0.01 -n macs2 --shift -75 --extsize 150 --nomodel --keep-dup all --outdir atacPeaks -t tagAlign.gz

PYTHONPATH=/media/volume/sdb/projects/Deconvolution/Software/main/src:$PYTHONPATH && export par_dir=$(dirname "{{InputFile:1}}") && python /media/volume/sdb/projects/Deconvolution/Software/main/src/deepdetails/cli.py prep-data --bulk-pl {{BulkPl}} --bulk-mn {{BulkMn}} --save-to {{Workspace}} --genome-fa {{HG38_PRIMARY_FA}} --chrom-size {{CellRangerATAC2020ChromSize}} --fragments merged_fragments.tsv.gz --barcodes merged_bcs.tsv --regions {{InputFile}} --accessible-regions atacPeaks/macs2_peaks.narrowPeak --background-sampling-ratio 1.0 --background-blacklist {{BlackListHG38}} --ref-labels $(cut -d',' -f1 $par_dir/scatac.norm.csv | sed -E 's/atac_ds\.([^.]+)\.tsv\.gz/\1/' | tr '
' ' ') --ref-pls $(cut -d',' -f1 $par_dir/scatac.norm.csv | sed -E "s|atac_ds\.([^.]+)\.tsv\.gz|$par_dir/\1.ds.pl.bw|" | tr '
' ' ') --ref-mns $(cut -d',' -f1 $par_dir/scatac.norm.csv | sed -E "s|atac_ds\.([^.]+)\.tsv\.gz|$par_dir/\1.ds.mn.bw|" | tr '
' ' ') {{FlexPars||--collapse-missing-cell-types}}
